title: modify tag with docker-archive old tag still exist.
body:
[root@cc9ddf8d39ac build_run_package]# buildah --version
buildah version 1.39.0 (image-spec 1.1.0, runtime-spec 1.2.0)

[root@cc9ddf8d39ac build_run_package]# buildah images
REPOSITORY                                            TAG                                       IMAGE ID       CREATED       SIZE
localhost/views                                       V6.0R00F00.arm                            b509aa527fdf   3 hours ago   1.94 GB

[root@cc9ddf8d39ac build_run_package]# buildah push views:V6.0R00F00.arm docker-archive:views.V6.0R00F00.arm.tar:views:V6.0R00F00.arm
Getting image source signatures
Copying blob b6f300b7dd2a done   | 
Copying blob 5c68eda4cbd2 done   | 
Copying config b509aa527f done   | 
Writing manifest to image destination

[root@localhost build_run_package]# docker load -i views.V6.0R00F00.arm.tar 
5c68eda4cbd2: Loading layer [==================================================>]  1.459GB/1.459GB
Loaded image: views:V6.0R00F00.arm
Loaded image: localhost/views:V6.0R00F00.arm   

[root@localhost build_run_package]# docker images;
REPOSITORY                                                    TAG                                           IMAGE ID       CREATED         SIZE
views                                                         V6.0R00F00.arm                                b509aa527fdf   3 hours ago     1.91GB
localhost/views                                               V6.0R00F00.arm                                b509aa527fdf   3 hours ago     1.91GB

localhost/views  tag still exist.
